subcodes.first_line: In the evening, O my God, I remember Thee amidst myriads of those near unto Thee, and at the break of dawn I call upon Thee, O my Hope, with melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی العشاء یا الهی اذکرک بربوات المقربین و فی الاشراق انادیک یا رجائی بنغمات
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for evening; night, @prayer for morning
